name: Hawaiian Sweet Bread (1 1/2 Lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 3/4 cup pineapple juice using one small can (6 oz.) or approximately 3/4 cup. If you prefer not to open a second can, add water until the desired amount is reached.
2. Substitute orange juice for a slightly different flavor if desired.
3. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl.
4. Form the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
5. Let the dough rise until doubled in size (use light setting).
